prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-3X4SLPB-100PC-3X4-CLR-PZ-AMZ Product Type: FOOD_STORAGE_BAG Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux 3 x 4 Inch Resealable Clear Plastic Bags Crafting Supplies Organization and Storage, 100 Pack Description: You can never be too organized. Keep small items safe and secure with ToolTreaux's clear plastic zip lock bags.

These resealing plastic bags measure 3 x 4 inches and have a thickness of 2mm. Each bag is resealable with a single zipper channel that is easy to open and close, making them reusable many times over.

The clear bags are ideal for keeping everything from jewelry, craft supplies or even food items like candy or nuts fresh, secure and organized. Completely clear in color, the storage bags make identifying contents quick and efficient, whether in your home, office, studio, warehouse or garage.

These clear plastic reusable storage bags are especially great for prolonging the life of fine jewelry and costume alike; single track zipper is easy to pinch shut, keeping out dirt, moisture and other free radicals that may tarnish or damage pieces if otherwise left out in the open.

Make sure to keep a pack of these around for household use, storage and organizational tasks, they'll always come in handy.

Each pack comes with 100 individual units. Search Terms: plastic bags small clear storage mini reclosable resealable jewelry for beads bead bag craft self lock crafting Features: - CLEAR REUSABLE BAGS: Plastic zip lock bags measure 3 x 4 inches with 2mm thickness; multipurpose, resealable and ideal for keeping everything from jewelry to candy protected, organized and secure - ORGANIZATION AND STORAGE: Convenient for home or office use, keep items neat and organized with ToolTreaux's clear plastic zip lock bags; clear colorway makes identification of contents quick and easy - CRAFTING SUPPLIES: Convenient to keep arts and craft supplies organized and together; secure beads, coins, scrapbooking supplies, stickers, nuts and bolts, stones, gems and more - JEWELRY ORGANIZER: Prolong the life of fine jewelry or costume jewelry alike; single track zipper is easy to pinch shut, keeping out dirt, moisture and other free radicals that may tarnish or damage jewelry - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 3 x 4 inches; Weight: 0.10lbs; Color: Clear; Material: Plastic; Thickness: 2mm; Package includes 100 units === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 100-Pack 3 x 4 in Clear Resealable Bags

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2Mm Thickness, Easy Zipper Seal, Jewelry And Craft Organization, Food Storage, Multipurpose Reusable

openai.title_differentiation: 2Mm Thick, Single Track Zipper, Reusable, Clear Visibility, Jewelry And Craft Storage, Moisture Resistant, 100 Count
